content.title: Compare Map
description: This section allows users to compare two datasets from different time periods for the same location, side by side.
To compare two datasets, select the Compare Map tool from the Analytics Tools menu on the left side of the map dashboard.
A split-screen window will appear. Choose the desired data layer from the dropdown menu at the top of each section.
You can also change the base map using the icon in the top-left corner of each section and zoom in or out to focus on specific regions for comparison.
Click the Back icon in the top-left corner to return to the main map dashboard.
